category_sources: source_facts.description says BuildKit is a concurrent, cache-efficient, Dockerfile-agnostic builder toolkit.
source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official moby/buildkit repository.
display_name_sources: Official moby/buildkit project branding uses BuildKit.
docs_sources: Official Docker documentation provides a dedicated BuildKit documentation page.
source_facts.repo points to the official moby/buildkit repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/moby/buildkit, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a cache-efficient builder toolkit.
